title: Starlink 4G fallback: serve pages under 800ms
meta_description: Cut page load time 60% on 4G in East Africa with Next.js 15, Redis 7.2, and a 120 kB client bundle — the exact steps teams used when Starlink lit up the region.
prewritten_tweet:
Teams shipping to East Africa in 2026 still treat every 4G user as 'fast'.

That’s why pages load in 3–5 s on cheap Android phones.

Here is the exact stack that cut TTFB to under 800 ms 👇
